case_title: INSURANCE COMPANY OF THE STATE OF PENNSYLVANIA VS. LINDA BUUVAN et al

docket_entries.description: REMOVED FROM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR ON SEP-29-2003 IN DEPT. 212 - DISMISSAL TO BE FILED.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF INSURANCE COMPANY OF THE STATE OF PENNSYLVANIA AS TO DEFENDANT BUUVAN, LINDA DOES 1 TO 100,INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUL-03-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-04-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-18-2003
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT VAN, LINDA BUU JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 5.0 DAYS
STIPULATION AND TO ORDER TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-03-416984 WITH CASE CGC-03-416831 (CONSOLIDATED FOR BOTH DISCOVERY AND TRIAL); ALL FURTHER ENTRIES UNDER CASE CGC-03-416831
SEE CONSOLIDATED LEAD CASE# 416831 FOR ALL FURTHER PURPOSES & FUTURE PLEADINGS; ADDRESSES FROM CASE# 416984 HAVE BEEN ADDED TO LEAD CASE# 416831.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ; DECLARATION RE: DILIGENCE; POS BY MAIL, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF INSURANCE COMPANY OF THE STATE OF PENNSYLVANIA SERVED FEB-23-2003, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BUUVAN, LINDA
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT VAN, LINDA BUU

(CONSOL. W/ CASE 416831) ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR SEP-01-2003. PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR SEP-29-2003 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. JUL-03-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
